SPHL498 Special Topics in Public Health (3 Credits) Topical and interdisciplinary courses of interest to upper level undergraduate students in the ﬁeld of Public Health not currently covered by the program. Restriction: Junior standing or higher. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs. Credit Only Granted for: SPHL498 or SPHL698 of same sufﬁx.
